'''âf-l-f''' ('''kafalaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pullulate|pullulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pullulate|pullulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kafalaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifalaf|thifalaf]] || [[word:jifalaf|jifalaf]] || [[word:shifalaf|shifalaf]] || [[word:kifalaf|kifalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufalaf|thuthufalaf]] || [[word:jujufalaf|jujufalaf]] || [[word:shushufalaf|shushufalaf]] || [[word:kukufalaf|kukufalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufalaf|thufalaf]] || [[word:jufalaf|jufalaf]] || [[word:shufalaf|shufalaf]] || [[word:kufalaf|kufalaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufalaf|thufalaf]] || [[word:jufalaf|jufalaf]] || [[word:shufalaf|shufalaf]] || [[word:kufalaf|kufalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefalaf|thefalaf]] || [[word:jefalaf|jefalaf]] || [[word:shefalaf|shefalaf]] || [[word:kefalaf|kefalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofalaf|thothofalaf]] || [[word:jojofalaf|jojofalaf]] || [[word:shoshofalaf|shoshofalaf]] || [[word:kokofalaf|kokofalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofalaf|thofalaf]] || [[word:jofalaf|jofalaf]] || [[word:shofalaf|shofalaf]] || [[word:kofalaf|kofalaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofalaf|thofalaf]] || [[word:jofalaf|jofalaf]] || [[word:shofalaf|shofalaf]] || [[word:kofalaf|kofalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfalaf|thĂŠfalaf]] || [[word:jĂŠfalaf|jĂŠfalaf]] || [[word:shĂŠfalaf|shĂŠfalaf]] || [[word:kĂŠfalaf|kĂŠfalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafalaf|thathafalaf]] || [[word:jajafalaf|jajafalaf]] || [[word:shashafalaf|shashafalaf]] || [[word:kakafalaf|kakafalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafalaf|thafalaf]] || [[word:jafalaf|jafalaf]] || [[word:shafalaf|shafalaf]] || [[word:kafalaf|kafalaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafalaf|thafalaf]] || [[word:jafalaf|jafalaf]] || [[word:shafalaf|shafalaf]] || [[word:kafalaf|kafalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafalaf|shafalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafalaf|goshafalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafalaf|gokishafalaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafalafnĂŒ|shafalafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafalafnknĂŒ|goshafalafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalafnĂŒ|gokishafalafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafalafshĂ«|shafalafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafalafnkshĂ«|goshafalafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafalafshĂ«|gokishafalafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalafro|shafalafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalafnkro|goshafalafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalafro|gokishafalafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalafmu|shafalafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalafnkmu|goshafalafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalafmu|gokishafalafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafalafsher|shafalafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafalafnksher|goshafalafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafalafsher|gokishafalafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafalafng|shafalafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafalafnkng|goshafalafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafalafng|gokishafalafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafalafya|shafalafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafalafnkya|goshafalafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafalafya|gokishafalafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafalafyam|shafalafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafalafnkyam|goshafalafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafalafyam|gokishafalafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalafnĂŒshĂ«|shafalafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafalafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafalafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalafnĂŒro|shafalafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalafnknĂŒro|goshafalafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalafnĂŒro|gokishafalafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalafnĂŒmu|shafalafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalafnknĂŒmu|goshafalafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalafnĂŒmu|gokishafalafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalafshĂ«nĂŒ|shafalafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafalafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafalafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalafshĂ«ro|shafalafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalafnkshĂ«ro|goshafalafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalafshĂ«ro|gokishafalafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalafshĂ«mu|shafalafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalafnkshĂ«mu|goshafalafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalafshĂ«mu|gokishafalafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalafronĂŒ|shafalafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalafnkronĂŒ|goshafalafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalafronĂŒ|gokishafalafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalafroshĂ«|shafalafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalafnkroshĂ«|goshafalafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalafroshĂ«|gokishafalafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafalafromu|shafalafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafalafnkromu|goshafalafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafalafromu|gokishafalafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafalafmunĂŒ|shafalafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafalafnkmunĂŒ|goshafalafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafalafmunĂŒ|gokishafalafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafalafmushĂ«|shafalafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafalafnkmushĂ«|goshafalafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafalafmushĂ«|gokishafalafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafalafmuro|shafalafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafalafnkmuro|goshafalafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafalafmuro|gokishafalafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
